resources.string:
Command: %1$s
Risk: %2$s
The whitelist is not restored, but destructive commands require manual confirmation.

%1$s
Safety gate: type exactly `%2$s` to continue.
Choose the app interface language. System default follows Android language settings.

File created: %1$s
Inside: log.txt, usb-info.txt, fastboot-info.txt, app-info.txt, files.txt, and profiles/*.json. You can attach it to a forum thread.
ERROR: log file has not been created yet

File: %1$s
The log is saved automatically. You can copy the path or send the log as a .txt file through the system menu.
Battery optimization is not available on this Android version
✅ Battery optimization is already disabled for the app
For long flashing, it is better to disable battery restrictions for this app. This lowers the risk that Android stops the process during file transfer.
ERROR: could not open battery settings: %1$s
[Terminal] Full ADB/Fastboot mode is active. Whitelist removed.
log folder is not created yet
Flashing %1$s to partition %2$s. Do not disconnect the cable.
Sending %1$s. Do not disconnect the cable.
Operation is running. Do not disconnect the cable.
Notification shown during flashing or ADB Sideload

Current status:
All files access: %1$s Notifications: %2$s Battery optimization exception: %3$s Overlay protection: %4$s
Used permissions: • All files access — reads .img/.zip/.sha256/.md5 from /sdcard/Download/NekoMiFlash. • Notifications — shows a foreground operation notification. • Wake lock — keeps CPU awake only during flashing or sideload and is released after the operation. • Hide overlay windows — on Android 12+ blocks other apps from drawing over this app during sensitive actions.
Not requested: • Draw over other apps / SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW. • Internet access. • Contacts, SMS, microphone, camera, phone, or location.
not required on this Android version
not supported on this Android version
ERROR: could not open app settings: %1$s
✅ Overlay protection enabled: other apps cannot cover this app window.
⚠️ Overlay protection could not be enabled: %1$s
Overlay protection is not available before Android 12.
Interface v2.1: full ADB/Fastboot terminal enabled without strict whitelist. SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW is not requested.
Queue is empty. Choose a partition below and select an .img file.

The app will flash these images in order:

%1$s

Checks: Fastboot connection, getvar cache, max-download-size, and sidecar SHA-256/MD5 files. The strict partition list is removed; verify model and slot before continuing.

The following flash queue will be executed:
%1$s
This writes images to bootloader partitions. Review model, slot, and file names before confirming.
Warning: %1$s looks like %2$s, but you selected partition %3$s.
Для работы нужны все разрешения. Нажмите кнопку ниже.
Все разрешения выданы. Отметьте чекбокс для входа.
Я понимаю риски прошивки и подтверждаю вход в инструмент
Раздел «%1$s» критичен. Ошибка может привести к bootloop. Подтвердите ещё раз.
Recovery → Apply update → Apply from ADB
Before transfer, the app checks SHA-256/MD5 if a .sha256 or .md5 file is next to the archive.
SELF-TEST: NOT RUN\nSelf-test has not been run yet
adb shell / adb shell getprop / fastboot getvar all
Import a Xiaomi/Redmi/POCO Fastboot ROM .zip/.tgz/.tar, analyze flash_all scripts, block lock scenarios, verify product, then flash the safe plan.
ERROR: No .zip/.tgz/.tar Xiaomi Fastboot ROM files in /sdcard/Download/NekoMiFlash. Import the ROM first.

ROM: %1$s Mode: %2$s
This operation may write many partitions, switch to fastbootd, run update-super, and wipe data depending on the selected mode and ROM script.

ROM: %1$s Mode: %2$s
%3$s
NekoMiFlash will parse flash_all scripts, block bootloader-lock commands, compare product with the connected device, extract referenced images, and execute only supported fastboot steps. Do not disconnect the cable.
This mode wipes userdata/metadata if the ROM script contains wipe commands.
This mode uses flash_all_except_storage when present. If this script is missing, flashing is blocked.
Resume uses the last saved fastbootd transition state. Use it only after the phone has reconnected in fastbootd/userspace and you are continuing the same ROM flash session.

ROM: %1$s
Step 1: analyze scripts. Step 2: check product/unlocked/ARB. Step 3: check storage and download limits. Step 4: show data impact. Step 5: flash only the selected safe plan.
Choose mode:
Read slot state, switch active slot, reboot bootloader/fastbootd, and flash stock boot chain images for recovery scenarios.
Flash a Magisk-patched boot/init_boot image with the same preflight checks used by normal Fastboot flashing.

Current slot: %1$s Target slot: %2$s
Use this only for bootloop recovery when the other slot contains a bootable system. Continue?

File: %1$s Detected target partition: %2$s
NekoMiFlash guesses the partition from the file name. Confirm this before flashing.

1. Patch the stock boot.img or init_boot.img in Magisk on the target device. 2. Copy the patched image to /sdcard/Download/NekoMiFlash. 3. Use Auto flash or choose boot/init_boot manually. 4. Keep stock images available for rollback.
Android 13+ devices often use init_boot. Older devices usually use boot.
Large recovery-style tiles for the main workflows. Device state stays visible above; the console stays visible below.
RUNNING — keep screen on and do not disconnect USB/OTG
COMPLETED — review the log/report before rebooting
FAILED — stop and inspect the report before retrying
WARNING — review the last event before continuing
Step queue: no active plan yet
NOVICE: diagnostics, reports, file import and analysis only. Flash/write actions are hidden or blocked.
STANDARD: guided flash actions are available; terminal stays locked and high-risk write actions are blocked.
EXPERT + HIGH RISK: full terminal and high-risk write actions are enabled. Typed confirmations are still required.
High-risk actions: unlocked for this session

This unlocks destructive actions such as clean all, vbmeta/super/userdata/metadata writes, slot switching and destructive Fastboot terminal commands. Use only when the ROM, product, slot and bootloader state were checked.
High-risk actions are available only in Expert profile. Switch to Expert first, then unlock high-risk actions.
Novice profile blocks flash/write operations. Switch to Standard or Expert after you check the device and files.
Action blocked: %1$s. Current profile: %2$s. Switch to Expert and unlock high-risk actions to continue.
Xiaomi ROM · Recovery · Magisk · Files · Reports
Workflow: import ROM → analyze scripts → check device/product/ARB → choose clean all or save data → review dry-run plan → flash with step queue and reports.
Workflow: check current slot first → use reboot fastbootd/bootloader when needed → flash only the stock image that matches the active slot and product.
Workflow: patch boot/init_boot in Magisk first → import patched image → let NekoMiFlash detect the target partition → confirm partition before flash.
File workflow: import ROM/images into the workspace, inspect images before flashing, copy the workspace path for manual checks, then return to Fastboot tools.
Reports workflow: run self-test, collect forum ZIP, open reports folder, and share sanitized logs without serials or private paths.
